author: alextes
content:
sorry for being a bit slow to respond. Potuz ty for the mention.

it seems to me how the proposer wants their block constructed can change how builders bid. e.g. imagine a proposer was trustless only, then just-in-time informs builders / relays they're actually fine with no-cap trusted bid from Ultra Sound. imagine 3 builders which couldn't put trusted 10 ETH bids in can now enter the competition. we'd have hundreds of milliseconds to inform builders, have them build new blocks, put in new bids, respond to those bids, pick the top bid, verify the block, and transport it to the proposer.

nice that we're not getting all proposers sending a registration every epoch anymore btw 😅
